summary: Antonelli's early pace signals a Mercedes resurgence at high-speed Spa, where Red Bull's wing revamp follows Verstappen's consecutive crashes and Ferrari seeks to build momentum from Hamilton's Spanish victory. Norris's 10-place grid penalty scrambles McLaren's strategy in the championship fight, creating opportunity for rivals to capitalize in the midfield battle. A dominant performance here could prove decisive in the tight title race, offering the winner crucial breathing room before the summer break.
